narrative:
Geneva City has 3,622 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
